untranslatable_reason: Signal requires sector relative strength comparison ('Stock outperforming sector average by >5%' and 'Stock underperforms sector by >5%') and 52-week high/low proximity checks. No sector benchmark or 52-week high/low indicators are in the allowed list. Substituted 20-bar Donchian upper band as proxy for recent strength, but this does not capture true 52-week highs or sector outperformance.
translation_notes: Translated 'Price > 50-day SMA AND 50-day SMA > 200-day SMA' directly. Substituted 'Price within 10% of 52-week high' with close > dc_upper as a strength proxy. Could not translate 'Stock outperforming sector by >5%' or avoid_low_buffer conditions without sector data. Exit condition 'Price closes below 50-day SMA' translated directly; sector underperformance exit condition omitted due to missing indicator.
